name: acme-q3-budget-hinglish
reference: Haan toh basically humne sample-01 campaign ka ROAS dekha aur it's not scaling the way we expected. Theek hai, let us reduce the budget on the underperforming ad sets and reallocate to the top three creatives by Friday. Decision: we move 40 percent budget to the new creative. Also the GST invoice for last month is still pending from finance.
